justification: Initial BSA/AML structuring rule baseline using a 14-day lookback.
Retuned after false-positive review; current version uses a tighter 10-day window and lower count threshold.
parameters_json: {"min_txn_amount":8000,"max_txn_amount":9999,"min_count":3,"window_days":10,"threshold_change_reason":"Reduced window from 14 to 10 days based on FP analysis"}

justification: Initial high-risk jurisdiction monitoring baseline aligned to FinCEN country-risk procedures.
Retuned to capture lower-value wires involving FATF grey-list and OFAC-sanctioned jurisdictions.
Initial watchlist screening threshold focused on high-confidence counterparty matches.
Retuned to include beneficial-owner screening and lower the match-score threshold to 85.
Initial cash-intensive business rule based on historical branch cash activity.
Retuned after branch cash-activity analysis to capture weekly and monthly cash spikes earlier.
Initial rapid movement rule focused on large pass-through activity within 72 hours.
Retuned to capture faster pass-through behavior within 48 hours and lower inflow thresholds.
Initial trade-based money laundering rule based on invoice-value variance and jurisdiction risk.
Retuned to capture invoice mismatch above 20 percent on multi-jurisdiction trade transactions.
